headline: How The Duke Energy (DUK) Investment Story Is Shifting With Data Center And Policy Risks
summary: Duke Energy’s latest fair value price target has been adjusted slightly, moving from US$139.39 to US$138.61 per share. That small trim lines up with a broader set of analyst updates, where price targets cluster near or just above current fair value assumptions while also reflecting concerns about permitting, political pushback around data centers, and recent trims from firms such as JPMorgan. Read on to see how these shifting targets fit into the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch...
